briefdescription.para: number of values from 0
number of allocated values
number of values of null frequencies from 0
sample size
maximum frequency
mean
variance
frequency for each value
Construction of a Reestimation object.
Copy of a Reestimation object.
Constructor by copy of the Reestimation class.
Constructor by merging of the Reestimation class.
Destructor of the Reestimation class.
Assignment operator of the Reestimation class.
Writing of the characteristics of a Reestimation object.

parameterdescription.para: flag on the writing of the shape characteristics,

briefdescription.para: Writing of the characteristics of a Reestimation object for a circular variable.
Display of a Reestimation object.
Computation of the number of values from 0.
Computation of the number of values of null frequency from 0.
Computation of the sample size.
Determination of the maximum frequency.
Determination of the mode.
Mean computation.
Computation of a quantile.

parameterdescription.para: value of the cumulative distribution function.

briefdescription.para: Variance computation.
Computation of the mean absolute deviation.
Computation of the log of the geometric mean.
Computation of the coefficient of skewness.
Computation of the excess kurtosis: excess kurtosis = coefficient of kurtosis - 3.
Computation of the mean direction for a circular variable.
Computation of the information quantity.
Computation of the log-likelihood of a discrete distribution for a sample.
Estimation of a categorical distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution.

memberdef.argsstring: (Distribution *dist, double weight, penalty_type pen_type, double *penalty, side_effect outside) const
memberdef.name: penalized_likelihood_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of a discrete distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution using a penalized likelihood estimator.

parameterdescription.para: penalty type (first- or second-order difference or entropy),
management of side effects (zero outside the support or continuation of the distribution).

briefdescription.para: Estimation of the parameters of a uniform distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution (estimation is biased)

parameterdescription.para: minimum lower bound of the support,

briefdescription.para: Estimation of the parameters of a shifted binomial distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution.

parameterdescription.para: minimum lower bound of the support,

memberdef.argsstring: (DiscreteParametric *pdist, int min_inf_bound, bool min_inf_bound_flag, double cumul_threshold) const
memberdef.name: poisson_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of the parameters of a shifted Poisson distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution.

parameterdescription.para: minimum lower bound of the support,
threshold on the cumulative distribution function.

memberdef.argsstring: (DiscreteParametric *pdist, int min_inf_bound, bool min_inf_bound_flag, double cumul_threshold) const
memberdef.name: negative_binomial_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of the parameters of a shifted negative binomial distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution.

parameterdescription.para: minimum lower bound of the support,
threshold on the cumulative distribution function.

memberdef.argsstring: (DiscreteParametric *pdist, int min_inf_bound, bool min_inf_bound_flag, double cumul_threshold) const
memberdef.name: geometric_poisson_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of the parameters of a shifted Poisson geometric distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution.

parameterdescription.para: minimum lower bound of the support,
threshold on the cumulative distribution function.

memberdef.argsstring: (DiscreteParametric *pdist, int min_inf_bound=0, bool min_inf_bound_flag=true, double cumul_threshold=CUMUL_THRESHOLD, bool geometric_poisson=false) const
memberdef.name: parametric_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of the parameters of a discrete parametric distribution (binomial, Poisson, negative binomial, Poisson geometric) on the basis of a frequency distribution.

parameterdescription.para: minimum lower bound of the support,
threshold on the cumulative distribution function,
flag on the estimation of a Poisson geometric distribution.

memberdef.argsstring: (DiscreteParametric *pdist, int min_inf_bound=0, bool min_inf_bound_flag=true, double cumul_threshold=CUMUL_THRESHOLD, bool geometric_poisson=false) const
memberdef.name: type_parametric_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of the type and parameters of a discrete parametric distribution (binomial, Poisson, negative binomial, Poisson geometric) on the basis of a frequency distribution.

parameterdescription.para: minimum lower bound of the support,
threshold on the cumulative distribution function,
flag on the estimation of a Poisson geometric distribution.

memberdef.argsstring: (int min_inf_bound=0, bool min_inf_bound_flag=true, double cumul_threshold=CUMUL_THRESHOLD) const
memberdef.name: type_parametric_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of the type and parameters of a discrete parametric distribution (binomial, Poisson, negative binomial) on the basis of a frequency distribution.

parameterdescription.para: minimum lower bound of the support,
threshold on the cumulative distribution function.

briefdescription.para: Combination of the reestimation quantities of the basis time interval distribution and the length-biased distribution (equilibrium stochastic process).

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the reestimation quantities of the length-biased distribution,

memberdef.argsstring: (const Reestimation< Type > *length_bias_reestim, Distribution *dist, double imean) const
memberdef.name: equilibrium_process_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of a discrete distribution on the basis of the reestimation quantities of the basis time interval distribution and the length-biased distribution (equilibrium stochastic process).

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the reestimation quantities of the length-biased distribution,

memberdef.argsstring: (const Reestimation< Type > *length_bias_reestim, Distribution *dist, double imean, double weight, penalty_type pen_type, double *penalty, side_effect outside) const
memberdef.name: penalized_likelihood_equilibrium_process_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of a discrete distribution on the basis of the reestimation quantities of the basis time interval distribution and the length-biased distribution using a penalized likelihood estimator (equilibrium stochastic process).

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the reestimation quantities of the length-biased distribution,
penalty type (first- or second-order difference or entropy),
management of side effects (zero outside the support or continuation of the distribution).

memberdef.argsstring: (const Reestimation< Type > *final_run, Reestimation< double > *occupancy_reestim, Type *occupancy_survivor, Type *censored_occupancy_survivor, bool characteristic_computation=true)
memberdef.name: state_occupancy_estimation

briefdescription.para: Estimation of a state occupancy distribution using the Kaplan-Meier estimator.

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the right-censored sojourn times,
pointer on the survival function corresponding to the complete sojourn times,
pointer on the survival function corresponding to the right-censored sojourn times,
flag for the computation of the characteristics of the reestimation quantities.

briefdescription.para: Estimation of a gamma distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution.
Estimation of a zero-inflated gamma distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution.
Estimation of an inverse Gaussian distribution on the basis of a frequency distribution.
Frequency distribution with integer or real (for EM algorithms) frequencies.

detaileddescription.para: Frequencies are represented as an array *frequency, with size alloc_nb_value frequency[i] is only meaningful for offset <= i < nb_value. For i < offset, frequency[i] may be either 0 or unspecified.
